Support Center

Help and contact information

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I log a doctor visit?

Go to the Dashboard and use the "Daily Activity Logger" form. Select "Doctor Visit" from the dropdown, enter the details, then click "Log Activity".

Why isn't my location working?

Make sure location permissions are enabled in your browser. You may need to refresh the page. If it still doesn't work, try using the "Get Location" button in the form.

How do I reset my password?

Contact your system admin or IT support. They are the only ones who can reset passwords. For security reasons, authorization is required.

Can I use this offline?

Currently, you need an internet connection for real-time sync. You can prepare your logs offline and submit them once you have internet.
